title: 天皇賞（春）の後に・目覚めし好敵手

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She may have won, but during the race, her
pacing seemed off. Anxious about her condition, I
run out onto the turf.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... I did it, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: However, I must apologize. I feel a bit off today.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Y-yes. I never found myself rushing like this
before. I wonder why...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's hard to think that someone as easygoing as
Mejiro Bright would find herself panicking during
a race.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
This was such an important race... But, I still
managed to win.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Spring has arrived, and not just to the base of
Mount Yotei, but here as well.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Grandmother, it's Bright! She won!

text_block_list.name: Grandmother Mejiro
text_block_list.text:
Yes. It comes as no surprise. It is as I said after
her debut race.

text_block_list.name: Grandmother Mejiro
text_block_list.text:
I declared that she would be the next
Umamusume to win the spring Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Huh?! But that race was like watching turtles!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Congratulations, Bright. I am proud to have you
as my successor.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Our bond has grown quite deep, yes? It's hard to
think we were once so alien to each other.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
You're right, McQueen... I will do my best to
fulfill my duty.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
And someday, I hope I can run side-by-side with
you in another spring Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Haha... This feels kinda bittersweet. You used to
be like a mini-me, ya know?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
My feelings toward you haven't changed one bit,
Ryan.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: To have all of you around me, I... I...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Here Mejiro Bright stands, at the heart of the
incredible Mejiro family.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Now then, Trainer, have you decided on the next
race?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
That's a good point. What would be best to prove
that Bright can stand up to these
speed-generation racers?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I don't have a specific race in mind, but there is
one unchanging wish I've held onto for a long
time...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I want to run in races that are meaningful to the
Mejiros. I have to...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
So, a race that's important to the Mejiros but also
relies heavily on speed...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One race comes to mind. It meets both criteria
perfectly.
choice_data_list: How about the autumn Tenno Sho?
How about the autumn Tenno Sho?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
The autumn Tenno Sho... I cannot say I'm
surprised.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: That's exactly what I was thinking.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's already won the spring Tenno Sho, so of
course the allure of winning the Twin Tenno Sho
would speak to her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Besides, other Umamusume are bound to want an
opportunity to measure the new generation's
speed. It's the perfect stage for a Mejiro to show
her stuff.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Now that it's decided, let's start preparing for the
autumn Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Oh, but before that... Trainer, there's something I
need to discuss with you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Everyone's been going on about speed this and speed that, but...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Who would you regard as the fastest Umamusume right now?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Lots of contenders come to mind. However, there
is one Umamusume who rose to unexpected fame
with her almost supernatural speed.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Bright knows her well, but she has since
transformed into a most fearsome opponent.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I won't turn back anymore. I will never look back
again.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
From the second those gates open until I cross
the finish line, no one will catch even a glimpse of
that view from the lead!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
A decisive victory for Silence Suzuka! What an
unbelievable margin to win by in this G2 race!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
That's her fourth victory in a row! And with her
otherworldly domination as a front runner, she's
on her way to the Takarazuka Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Suzuka... How did I not predict this?

text_block_list.name: The Mejiros
text_block_list.text: Whoooooa!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Wow, Suzuka...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Everyone watching the race from the Mejiro
estate seems to freeze.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Silence Suzuka, who competed with Mejiro Bright
during the Classics, is the Umamusume being
lauded as this generation's fastest.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Bright, I... I'm going to run in the Takarazuka
Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Dober?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: It wouldn't be permissible for you to shoulder this burden all by yourself. Plus, we promised that we'd both work hard for the Mejiros.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I don't know if you'll change your plans, but I'm
going to race. Even if I lose, we'll learn something
about her.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Of course, my first aim is to win! I'm a Mejiro
Umamusume too, after all!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Dober... Your passion is incredible!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, if possible, I would also like to race with
Dober.
choice_data_list: In the Takarazuka Kinen? I'll consider it.
In the Takarazuka Kinen? I'll consider it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our ultimate goal might be the autumn Tenno
Sho, but the Takarazuka Kinen is also an
important race. We could use it to test the
waters.
